short_description: SMTP relay outage causing all church email notifications to fail
description: Root cause analysis for recurring email delivery failures. SMTP credentials invalidated during hosting maintenance on June 1st.

short_description: Payment gateway API key misconfiguration pattern
description: Investigating why gateway API keys become invalidated after hosting updates; prevent recurrence.

short_description: Website links breaking after content updates
description: Known error pattern where internal links break when pages are moved or renamed during updates.

short_description: Calendar plugin pulling wrong-year event data
description: Identifying configuration defect causing the calendar plugin to display prior-year events instead of current year.

short_description: Mobile performance degradation from unoptimized images
description: Recurring pattern of mobile timeouts caused by full-resolution images uploaded without compression.

short_description: Newsletter plugin database write failures
description: Investigating persistent database write failures in the newsletter subscription plugin after the latest plugin update.

short_description: WordPress plugin conflicts after automatic updates
description: Multiple incidents where plugins auto-update and break form submission or display functionality.

short_description: File permission errors on media upload directory
description: Recurring permissions issue where uploaded media files become inaccessible after server restarts.

short_description: Church Wi-Fi intermittent drops during Sunday services
description: Investigating root cause of Wi-Fi signal loss in sanctuary; possibly related to interference from audio equipment.

short_description: Password-protected sections rejecting valid credentials
description: Pattern of valid credentials being rejected on restricted pages after the site cache is cleared.

short_description: Office laptop slowdown after Windows updates
description: Investigating whether Defender settings or startup bloat from the latest Windows cumulative update is causing slowdowns.

short_description: Form email notifications not reliably reaching staff inboxes
description: Multiple contact and registration forms intermittently failing to deliver notifications; linked to SMTP relay instability.

short_description: Fellow hall projector signal loss pattern
description: Intermittent HDMI handshake failure between projector and laptops; investigating driver and cable causes.

short_description: Hosting provider maintenance causing recurring configuration resets
description: Provider maintenance windows repeatedly resetting custom server configurations including SMTP and file permissions.

short_description: SSL certificate expiration management gap
description: No automated renewal or alerting in place for SSL certificates; discovered close to expiration.

short_description: Donation receipt automation reliability issue
description: Receipt automation system has single point of failure tied to SMTP relay; needs redundancy design.

short_description: Website not optimized for mobile congregation access
description: Systemic mobile performance issue across multiple pages; requires comprehensive image and script optimization.

short_description: Document upload limits inconsistent across portal sections
description: Different sections of the website have inconsistent file upload limits causing member confusion.

short_description: Church calendar widget not syncing with event management system
description: Events created in the event management plugin are not reliably appearing in the calendar widget on the home page.

short_description: Member authentication session expiry too short
description: Member portal sessions expire after 15 minutes, requiring frequent re-authentication and causing password reset requests.
